response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced Senior/Staff-level developer with nearly 20 years of industry experience, making him severely overqualified for an entry-level Junior Java Developer role. While he has incidental Java exposure and demonstrates strong technical breadth including agile practices and cloud tooling, his primary production stack is TypeScript/Node.js and his German proficiency is self-described as only 'Basic' — a hard requirement for a client-facing role in the German insurance sector. The overqualification mismatch presents an unacceptably high attrition risk regardless of technical fit.
strengths: Broad OOP background across multiple languages including Java, TypeScript, C++, and DLang with demonstrated production use
Proven agile discipline including TDD, CI/CD, pairing, and trunk-based development across multiple employer contexts
Cloud and infrastructure experience with AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes relevant to modern digitalization projects
concerns: Severely overqualified at Staff/Senior level with ~20 years of experience — entry-level role creates near-certain flight and compensation misalignment risk
German is self-rated 'Basic', directly failing the strong verbal and written German communication requirement for client-facing insurance work
Java is a peripheral skill with no evidence of Java as a primary production language in any recent or significant role
